anime art of an intimate close-up of a ethereal South Asian woman with soft oval features, her warm caramel skin glowing under twinkling festival lights. Her luminous kohl-rimmed eyes hold playful mischief, framed by naturally arched eyebrows. middle-parted black hair cascades over an embroidered dupatta, adorned with gajra flowers., world-class masterpiece, 4k, best quality, anime art.
